_publications._publicationTitle: Clinician Perspectives of a Magnetic Resonance Imaging-Based 3D Volumetric Analysis Tool for Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Related Schwannomatosis: Qualitative Pilot Study.

_contextSnippet: surveys and clinical interviews were conducted to evaluate the efficacy of current 2D tumor analysis protocols
details: Successfully used to transcribe clinical interviews for analysis of clinician perspectives on 3D volumetric analysis tools
